bug.description: missed scheduling opportunity where a UE with pending data is not scheduled

prompt:
There is a missed scheduling opportunity where a UE with pending data is not scheduled downstream of function fill_report_style_4 in the openair2/E2AP/RAN_FUNCTION subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/E2AP/RAN_FUNCTION/O-RAN/ran_func_rc.c:134.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
